hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, a Bollinger squeeze (bb_width at <20th percentile) followed by a bar closing outside the bands signals a volatility expansion that runs >=1.5R within 30 bars, filtered by ATR percentile rising (not dead market).

signal.entry_long: bb_width(20,2.0) 5-bars-ago was < 20th_percentile(200) AND close > upper_bb(20,2.0) AND close > close[5]
signal.entry_short: bb_width(20,2.0) 5-bars-ago was < 20th_percentile(200) AND close < lower_bb(20,2.0) AND close < close[5]

notes: Squeeze-to-expansion breakout distinct from Donchian N-bar breakout; entry requires compression precondition.
